task_completion.description: Agent joins the meeting from the pre-join screen.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen transitions from the Jitsi pre-join screen to the active meeting interface.
The 'More actions' menu (usually represented by three dots or a similar icon in the bottom toolbar) is open and visible.
The Settings modal dialog is open on the screen.

task_completion.description: Agent navigates to the 'More' tab within Settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'More' tab in the Settings dialog is selected and its specific contents are displayed.

task_completion.description: Agent enables the 'Everyone follows me' setting.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The checkbox or toggle for 'Everyone follows me' is clearly marked as checked or enabled within the Settings dialog.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the Jitsi Meet web interface via the Firefox browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: Firefox browser window is visible with the Jitsi Meet interface, rather than terminal windows executing API commands.

integrity.description: Agent is in the correct TrainingSession room.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Firefox address bar shows a URL containing 'TrainingSession' (likely followed by a timestamp).

integrity.description: Agent used the standard UI to change settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser Developer Tools (Inspect Element/Console) are open to artificially manipulate the DOM.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The room name in the URL will start with 'TrainingSession' followed by a Unix timestamp. The 'Everyone follows me' setting is located in the Jitsi Meet UI, typically under the 'More actions' menu -> 'Settings' -> 'More' tab.
